text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The "OECD Principles on Artificial Intelligence" is a real, well-documented policy document adopted on 22 May 2019 by OECD member countries, published by the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development. It is a non-academic real-world standards/policy document, so its absence from academic databases (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, etc.) is expected; the author listed ("Organisation for Economic Co-operation") is a recognizable shorthand for the OECD, and the cited URL points to the correct OECD domain.
LINK: https://www.oecd.org/en/topics/sub-issues/ai-principles.html
